title: cyperus globosus var. humifusus
intro: Cyperus globosus var. humifusus, also known as the Swamp Sedge or Dwarf Umbrella Sedge, is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and aiding in wound healing. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a herbal remedy in the form of infusions, decoctions, or poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
